channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Architecture Index
item.description: Auto-generated architecture index.

item.title: Plugin System Redesign (2026)
item.description: Design spec for unifying Vox's modularity surfaces — Cargo features, vox-skills, and capability registries — into a single runtime-loadable plugin system that…

item.title: Plugin System Redesign — SP1 Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step implementation plan for Sub-Project 1 of the plugin system redesign: plugin manifest schemas, the vox-plugin-catalog SSOT crate, hand-rolled and…

item.title: Plugin System Redesign — SP2 Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step implementation plan for Sub-Project 2: vox-plugin-api shared types, vox-plugin-host loader for both code and skill payloads, dual-payload…

item.title: Plugin System Redesign — SP3 Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step implementation plan for Sub-Project 3: define the MlBackend extension-point trait, extract candle-cuda from vox-populi into a standalone…

item.title: Plugin System Redesign — SP4 Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Step-by-step implementation plan for Sub-Project 4: migrate the vox.compiler skill from vox-skills's compile-time builtins to a standalone skill-payload plugin…

item.title: Vox-Populi Extraction Follow-Up Plan (2026)
item.description: Plan for the remaining code-motion work after the plugin system foundation landed. Covers vox-populi mens/tensor residual, vox-populi transport, vox-tensor…

item.description: Decision guide for choosing the right Vox distribution bundle for your use case.

item.description: Auto-generated authoritative list of Vox distribution bundles and their plugin composition.

item.title: Distribution Bundles
item.description: What Vox bundles are, how to pick one, and how to roll your own.

item.description: Auto-generated authoritative list of all first-party Vox plugins.

item.description: What the Vox plugin catalog is and how it relates to per-plugin manifests.

item.title: Plugin Manifest (Plugin.toml)
item.description: Schema for the Plugin.toml file every Vox plugin ships.

item.title: ADR-029: Formal Intent and Tool Receipt Auditing
item.description: Architecture Decision Record for formal intent and cryptographic tool receipts in the Vox ecosystem.

item.description: Official documentation for Architecture Decision Records (ADR) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, a

item.title: Codebase Cleanup & Signal Improvement Plan (2026-05-02)
item.description: Six-phase plan to retire stale code, fix broken references, and converge on single sources of truth.

item.title: Web App Archetype Coverage Map (2026)
item.description: Coverage map of 21 web-app archetypes against Vox's current substrate. Every blocker traced to a named language, runtime, codegen, or DevEx gap. Prioritization…

item.title: cli
item.description: Documentation for cli.md

item.title: Deployment: Docker, Compose, Coolify, CI (SSOT)
item.description: Official documentation for Deployment: Docker, Compose, Coolify, CI (SSOT) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architectu

item.title: Mesh / Populi SSOT (CPU-first)
item.description: Official documentation for mesh (Populi) runtime, env vars, and HTTP control plane (CPU-first).

item.title: ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine
item.description: Official documentation for ADR 010 — TanStack as the Vox web spine for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guide

item.title: ADR 017: Populi lease-based authoritative remote execution
item.description: Normative target model for single-owner lease semantics, A2A transport, and local fallback when promoting remote execution beyond best-effort relay.

item.title: ADR-027: Dual-Track UI Surfaces (Vox-Native vs React/TanStack Interop)
item.description: Splits Vox's UI primitives into a Vox-native reactivity track and an explicit React/TanStack interop track, with a sharp boundary so each track stays coherent…

item.title: ADR-028: Remove Stub Durability/Scheduling Grammar from Public API
item.description: Proposes removing @scheduled, @durable, workflow, and activity from the public Vox grammar, retaining actor with documented limitations, following the…

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
